name: Distribución Mayorista / B2B
description: Distribución mayorista, importación/exportación, y negocios B2B de suministro a retailers, restaurantes, cadenas o industrias. Foco en volumen, margen y relaciones comerciales B2B.

biz_evaluator.context: Evaluate wholesale viability: volume economics, minimum order quantities (MOQ), supply chain stability, customer concentration risk (top 3 clients = what % of revenue?), and barriers to entry for new distributors.

growth_hacker.context: B2B lead generation: trade show presence, industry association networks, LinkedIn B2B outreach targeting purchasing managers, cold email sequences, and distributor/reseller acquisition programs.

marketing_strategist.context: Trade marketing: B2B content (product catalogs, spec sheets, case studies, ROI calculators), trade publications, LinkedIn ABM advertising, and co-marketing programs with key accounts.

sales_lead.context: B2B wholesale sales: key account management structure, volume discount tiers, payment terms negotiation (NET 30/60/90), exclusivity and territorial agreements, and formal distributor onboarding programs.

cfo_finance.context: Wholesale financials: volume-driven margins (typically 20-40%), accounts receivable aging management, inventory carrying costs, currency risk for imports/exports, and working capital cycle optimization.

legal_expert.context: B2B commercial law: distribution and supply agreements, exclusivity clauses and territorial rights, payment terms enforcement, product liability in the supply chain, and import/export compliance (customs, tariffs, certificates of origin).

competitor_analyst.context: Wholesale competitive dynamics: pricing benchmarks by volume tier, distributor network coverage maps, supplier relationship strength, logistics and fulfillment capabilities, and regional market share analysis.
